restricted_mm {
  n0: 3
  n1: 1
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[1,0,0]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[0,1,0]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 0
    a: 1
    text: "[0,0,1]"
  }
  tensor: "0"
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 1
  n0: 3
  n1: 1
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[1,0,0]"
  }
  restriction {
    a: 0
    a: 1
    a: 0
    text: "[0,1,0]"
  }
  tensor: "a20*b00*c02 + a20*b01*c12"
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 2
  n0: 3
  n1: 1
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  restriction {
    a: 1
    a: 0
    a: 0
    text: "[1,0,0]"
  }
  tensor: "a10*b00*c01 + a10*b01*c11 + a20*b00*c02 + a20*b01*c12"
}
restricted_mm {
  index: 3
  n0: 3
  n1: 1
  n2: 2
  p: 2
  tensor: "a00*b00*c00 + a00*b01*c10 + a10*b00*c01 + a10*b01*c11 + a20*b00*c02 + a20*b01*c12"
}
